function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-30T10:47:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Invoice bundle request"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_19__eur_000760__inv_0007__helios_backfill_process_pack.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_18__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the oldest two invoices linked to the client at the tax firm (Helios / Claudia):

- INV-0006 (2025-12-18)
- INV-0007 (2026-01-19)

Thanks,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox verification: attachments were both read and ordered newest-first; subject quoted safely; reply fidelity is concise not quoting source text. Recipient uses reply context from canonical inbox header (from: miles@novak.example). Next required cleanup is deleting processed inbox item.
Task completed: processed oldest inbox item, created outbound draft with correct attachments, and removed inbox file per workflow.

function.message: Processed the oldest inbox message and prepared the requested invoice-bundle reply in outbox: `60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md`. I attached the two oldest invoices linked to the tax-firm client (Claudia/Helios): INV-0006 (2025-12-18) and INV-0007 (2026-01-19), ordered newest-first within the attachment list. Then I deleted the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), inspected 99_system workflows, processed lowest-sorted inbox file, treated inbox header as canonical email metadata, used canonical entity/invoice records for identity and invoice linkage, created outbox email per sending-email schema, and deleted inbox file after completion per inbox-processing-v2.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request asked for the oldest 2 invoices linked to the client at the tax firm. Canonical identity resolution in `10_entities/cast/claudia.md` shows Claudia with `primary_contact_email` at `helios-tax.example`, and the two earliest linked Helios/Claudia invoices are confirmed in `50_finance/invoices/...inv_0006...` (issued_on 2025-12-18) and `...inv_0007...` (issued_on 2026-01-19). Outbound record was created in `60_outbox/outbox/` using runtime timestamp format and proper attachment ordering, then the processed inbox file was removed as required.
completed_steps_laconic: read canonical invoice files INV-0006 and INV-0007
